settings.intro: How Bizarre Tropicals collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
settings.default_body:
We respect your privacy and only use your data to run the store, fulfil orders, and communicate with you about your purchase or enquiry.

  • What we collect: Name, email, phone, shipping address, and order history when you buy or contact us. Newsletter sign-ups store your email only.
  • How we use it: To process payments, ship orders, respond to messages, and send marketing emails if you opted in. We do not sell your data to third parties.
  • Payment processing: Card and checkout data are handled by Shopify and our payment providers — we do not store full card numbers on our servers.
  • Cookies: The site uses cookies for cart, checkout, analytics, and preferences as described in Shopify’s cookie banner where applicable.
  • Your rights: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us. South African POPIA rights apply where relevant.
  • Retention: Order records are kept as required for tax and warranty purposes, then archived or deleted according to law.

Questions about privacy? Contact sales@bizarretropicals.com.
